## 自查 / Self-Check

- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate_skills.py`
- [ ] I added or updated `references/overview.md`
- [ ] The skill is based on credible sources, not quote aggregation
- [ ] I separated high-confidence and low-confidence sources
- [ ] I translated the method into modern, lawful, non-harmful guidance
- [ ] I added clear usage and output structure
